selections.name: Sunstaz
selections.reason: Draws the inside barrier and has placed on soft going previously. Well weighted to run a bold race.

selections.name: Miss Como
selections.reason: Has shown ability and handles the soft conditions. Wide draw is a slight concern but has the speed to overcome.

selections.name: Polymer
selections.reason: Trained by the elite Snowden stable. Resuming from a break and trialed well. Weight penalty applies but class is evident.

selections.name: Juviance
selections.reason: Experienced maiden who has placed multiple times on soft tracks. Wide gate makes it tricky but will be running on.

danger_horse.name: Miss Como
danger_horse.reason: Capable of a bold run if she can cross from the wide barrier without expending too much energy.

selections.name: Pratibha
selections.reason: Kris Lees trained filly who came home strongly last start. The extra distance suits perfectly.

selections.name: Siccius
selections.reason: Another from the Lees yard. Gets the inside draw advantage and should improve significantly second-up.

selections.name: Risk And Famous
selections.reason: Improver over the extra trip. Has the right profile to figure in the finish.

selections.name: Carmine
selections.reason: Has placed on soft going before. Wide draw is a negative but has the experience edge.

danger_horse.name: Siccius
danger_horse.reason: Inside draw gives him a tactical advantage to dictate terms or sit just behind the speed.

selections.name: Risk Assessment
selections.reason: Gets a significant weight relief bonus and draws perfectly. Excellent recent form and handles the wet.

selections.name: Cutting Edge
selections.reason: Won well last start and is a proven wet track performer. Weight penalty is the only concern.

selections.name: Deebee's Girl
selections.reason: Fitter now second-up. Has placed on soft going and maps to get a nice run in transit.

selections.name: Where's The Fire
selections.reason: Nicely placed in this grade and finds a winnable contest despite the slightly awkward draw.

danger_horse.name: Cutting Edge
danger_horse.reason: Winning form is good form. If he handles the big weight, he is the clear danger to the top pick.

selections.name: Longchamp Lad
selections.reason: Racing well and due for a change of luck. Has placed on soft tracks and brings strong form lines.

selections.name: Busy Bee
selections.reason: Excellent debut run on a slow track. Should take the next step today from a good gate.

selections.name: Rockbarton Marshal
selections.reason: Came home strongly on debut. The inside draw is a massive advantage here.

selections.name: Jigadee
selections.reason: Has claims from the low draw and should be fitter after recent runs.

danger_horse.name: Busy Bee
danger_horse.reason: Showed plenty of ability on debut and has natural improvement to come.

selections.name: Rock The Machine
selections.reason: Wet track specialist with an excellent strike rate on soft going. Won well last start and draws the inside.

selections.name: Damascus Gate
selections.reason: Improving gelding who won nicely last start. Can handle the class rise and the distance.

selections.name: Strobing
selections.reason: Well placed with a sharp weight drop. Has the stamina for this trip.

selections.name: Rockbarton Icon
selections.reason: Going well and cannot be left out of calculations from a favorable draw.

danger_horse.name: Damascus Gate
danger_horse.reason: Brings winning form and has the tactical speed to overcome the middle draw.

selections.name: Stern Dispute
selections.reason: Gets a wet track bonus and is nicely placed in this grade. Will relish the extra trip.

selections.name: Battledance
selections.reason: Experienced campaigner who drops in weight. Capable of a strong showing despite the wide gate.

selections.name: Nikody's Binks
selections.reason: Gets significant weight relief which is crucial in this grade. Can run a race at odds.

selections.name: Time Ruler (NZ)
selections.reason: Lightly weighted and maps well from the middle draw. Can figure in the exotics.

danger_horse.name: Battledance
danger_horse.reason: Has the class to overcome the wide draw if the pace is genuine.

selections.name: Chisato (NZ)
selections.reason: Wet track specialist who won her only start on soft going. Sharp improver willing to forgive last run.

selections.name: Wilderness Star
selections.reason: Stays in the mix with a light weight. Has the experience to handle these conditions.

selections.name: Maggie Sparkles
selections.reason: Form is hard to fault. Won recently on a soft track and is a big chance to go back-to-back.

selections.name: Steely Girl
selections.reason: Encouraging effort last start and draws well. Sure to prove tough to beat.

danger_horse.name: Wilderness Star
danger_horse.reason: Veteran mare who knows how to race in these conditions and carries a feather weight.
